case_title: LOUIS BURKS VS. PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF *(AUTHORIZED AGENT: LINDA Y.H. CHENG)* SERVED OCT-21-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY STAFFORD, CINDY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT BURKS, LOUIS DEFENDANT FAILED TO SUBMIT SUFFICIENT ADMISSIBLE EVIDENCE TO ESTABLISH PLAINTIFF'S LIABILITY FOR THE SUBJECT PROPERTY DAMAGE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY BURKS, LOUIS AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY STAFFORD, CINDY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-13-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BURKS, LOUIS AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED DEC-03-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT BURKS, LOUIS
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-13-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-13-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-13-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-13-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-13-2010 - JUDGMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-13-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BURKS, LOUIS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY STAFFORD, CINDY THE DEFENDANT ACTED IN GOOD FAITH IN NOTIFYING THE DMV. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT BURKS, LOUIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-13-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
